mapper.insert: INSERT INTO charge(register_id, patient_id, patient_name, charge_type, amount, status) VALUES(#{charge.registerId}, #{charge.patientId}, #{charge.patientName}, #{charge.chargeType}, #{charge.amount}, 'unpaid')
mapper.update: UPDATE charge SET status = 'paid', payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM charge WHERE status = 'paid' AND create_time >= DATE(NOW())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM charge WHERE charge_type = '药品费' AND create_time >= DATE(NOW())
SELECT SUM(amount) FROM charge WHERE status = 'paid' AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND create_time < DATE(NOW())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM charge WHERE charge_type = '药品费' AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND create_time < DATE(NOW())
